summary:
- publisher=Reuters, title=Oil’s geopolitical premium vanished in 2025 - and may not return, directness=high, why=contradicts user’s assumption of rising 2025 Strait risk; suggests premium collapsed, not escalated, next=http://uk.mobile.reuters.com/markets/commodities/oils-geopolitical-premium-vanished-2025-may-not-return-2025-12-22/
- publisher=Reuters, title=Iran’s Hormuz gamble ushers ‘tense new normal’ for Gulf energy, directness=high, why=confirms active escalation of Strait of Hormuz tensions in 2026, with Iran asserting control and U.S. threatening blockade, next=https://www.cn.reuters.com/markets/commodities/irans-hormuz-gamble-ushers-tense-new-normal-gulf-energy-2026-04-13/
- publisher=Reuters, title=Iran’s Hormuz gamble ushers ‘tense new normal’ for Gulf energy, directness=high, why=U.S. military reportedly enforcing blockade; Trump quotes “eliminated” as policy cue, next=http://timesofcrisis.reuters.com/markets/commodities/irans-hormuz-gamble-ushers-tense-new-normal-gulf-energy-2026-04-13/
- publisher=Reuters, title=Iran’s Hormuz gamble ushers ‘tense new normal’ for Gulf energy, directness=medium, why=links IRGC to crypto-based fund flows via Kharrazi family, implying sanctions evasion infrastructure, next=https://ara.reuters.com/markets/commodities/irans-hormuz-gamble-ushers-tense-new-normal-gulf-energy-2026-04-13/
- publisher=Reuters, title=Trader or driller? Iran war exposes Big Oil’s transatlantic divide, directness=high, why=confirms Iran conflict is actively reshaping oil trading dynamics and profit models in 2026, next=https://www.reuters.com/markets/commodities/trader-or-driller-iran-war-exposes-big-oils-transatlantic-divide-2026-04-30/
- publisher=Reuters, title=World Bank forecasts 24% surge in energy prices in 2026 due to Middle East war, directness=high, why=quantifies systemic price risk from Strait-related conflict, baseline scenario exceeds Ukraine invasion impact, next=https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/world-bank-forecasts-24-surge-energy-prices-2026-due-middle-east-war-2026-04-28/

Note: Five distinct URLs point to the same core article on Iran’s Hormuz strategy; consolidated into one primary lead with multiple access points for verification. The 2025 premium collapse (first result) is a critical counter-narrative requiring reconciliation with 2026 escalation trends.
